title: Farewell to the Barto Club
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on farewell to the barto club within the Zou and the Ripples of Dressrosa storyline.
scene: The story cuts between Zou, the Revolutionary Army, Blackbeard's crew, Buggy's organization, and the Straw Hats climbing the giant elephant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa AAAAA AAA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Pipe down already!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There it is! The grand ship that carries the holy spirit of the Straw Hat crew,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The thousand sunny-senpai! Praise be unto thee! Praise be unto thee!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't Worship ) It!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm relieved; it definitely seems like they've made it here too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like she managed to escape bigmam's clutches... not much sign of any external damage either...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oooiii! Sanjiii! Nami!!! Chopper! Brooook! Moooooo!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And... what was that gas guy's name again...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The ship's empty.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Looks like they all went ashore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright! Everyone, go get 'em! Watch your backs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're coming too, doofus.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sempais! Is there anything more you may require?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd love to continue to accompany you all and fulfill my dream of seeing the "Straw Hat all-stars,"

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: But I just can't continue to intrude on the adventure of my gods!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our happiness barometers are already at full throttle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Till the day we meet again!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: We of the Barto Club swear to never bring shame to the banner of the Straw Hat crew,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and to faithfully and tirelessly serve under it!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: And if our efforts are deemed worthy, I pray that I be allowed to request the remaining four signatures of your godly crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It would be the greatest honor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Perfectly ignored!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A WORM?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Nah, it's definitely a snake.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It has legs, guys. It has to be a lizard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WHO CARES! WE'RE STILL ON CLOUD NINE~)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Come forth!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Climbing Dragon!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Dragon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: DRAAA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I almost want to put that thing out of its misery!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Look here, bub...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: So... cute...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Now then, grab ahold of this dragon's back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: DRAA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: This thing doesn't even fly!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Ahaha! Alright, LEGO!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Later, Lomeo- bro, and the rest of you! Thanks for bringing us all the way here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHA... wait... was that... just now... my name... did he...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Congrats, boss!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: th- the pleasure was all mine! Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Please, take care of your- selves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys take care too! See ya around!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Savor the moment, Boss!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so, one party of our friends make for the peak of the mystical island, Zou.

summary: Farewell to the Barto Club: The Straw Hats reach the giant elephant Zou while the Revolutionary Army, Blackbeard Pirates, and Buggy's organization all react to the fall of Doflamingo.
